name: com.harrisoncollab/renoun
title: ReNoUn — Crypto Regime Classification
description: Pre-trade structural risk check for autonomous trading agents. Classifies crypto market regimes (bounded/active/unstable) with 98% accuracy across 240+ graded predictions. Returns regime, action, exposure scalar, and stability estimate (halflife, urgency, exit window). 50 free calls/day, no credit card.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token from POST /v1/keys/provision (free, no credit card). Format: Bearer rn_agent_...

environmentVariables.name: RENOUN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from POST /v1/keys/provision. Format: rn_agent_...
